Reduce Chicekn Jus from 700g to 450g
If not at room temperature, cut the butter into tabs
In a robot coupe, chicken jus and butter and pulse until it becomes a smooth, seasoned butter (spread-like)
Add basil and chili flake and pulse-blend again to evenly distribute
Add half of the parsley, pulse-blend until distributed
Reserve to a mixing bowl and fold in the remaining parsley and chive
Add Mother #2 and season with salt to taste.
Reserve in Pastry Piping bags and chill in the freezer or blast chiller
Once fully cooled but capable of being squeezed through the bag, cut a half inch diameter hole in the pastry bag
Pipe on to a sheet tray lengthwise, from edge to edge, then chill in the freezer.
Cut pieces 2 inch long and reserve for stuffing chicken breasts
